name_cn:
◎Light Grey•Silver|Picotin Lock
A unique presence in Hermès.
▏Lightweight, durable, and waterproof, a design close to life ▏
Since its launch in 2002, this bag, nicknamed the "basket," has remained popular to this day✔️No entry-level Picotin is complete without it🤩
-- Motorcycle in stock, original cowhide.
Actual photo 22Cm
In stock 18cm
